title: ulex genistoides var. spartioides
intro: Ulex genistoides var. spartioides, also known as the 'Scotch gorse' or 'Furze', is a variety of the Ulex genistoides shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ulex genistoides var. spartioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and other ailments.
